settings.content: Core palette. Section-level overrides live on the Header section.

Engraving is a paid add-on, not free. Link a lightweight Shopify product below (e.g. "Gravare personalizată") and its price will be charged automatically as a second cart line whenever a customer types engraving text. Until you link a product, the placeholder price is shown but nothing is charged.

settings.label: Placeholder price (shown until a product is linked)
